---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for VolunteerIQ
title: "[FEAT] "
labels: ["enhancement", "needs-triage"]
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

<!-- A clear, one-sentence description of the feature you're requesting. -->

## Problem Statement

<!-- What problem does this feature solve? Who experiences this problem and how often?
Example: "As an NGO Coordinator, I find it difficult to... because..." -->

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe your ideal solution. Be as specific as possible — UI mockups, API changes, data model changes, etc. are welcome. -->

## Use Case / User Story

<!-- Who benefits from this feature and how?
Example: "As a Volunteer, I want to see a map of nearby incidents on my phone so that I can quickly navigate to the mission location." -->

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered other approaches? Why is your proposal better for this use case? -->

## Is This In-Scope for MVP?

<!-- Check one: -->

- [ ] Yes — this is a missing core feature that should be in the MVP
- [ ] No — this is a future roadmap feature (V2 / post-challenge)
- [ ] Not sure — needs team discussion

## Feature Category

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] 🤖 AI / Gemini integration
- [ ] 🗺️ Map / geolocation
- [ ] 💬 WhatsApp / notifications
- [ ] 📊 Dashboard / analytics
- [ ] 🔐 Authentication / authorization
- [ ] 👤 Volunteer Portal
- [ ] 📋 Issue management
- [ ] ⚙️ Settings / configuration
- [ ] 🌐 Landing page / marketing
- [ ] 🔌 API / backend
- [ ] 📱 Mobile / responsiveness
- [ ] 🔒 Security
- [ ] ♿ Accessibility
- [ ] Other: ___

## Implementation Notes

<!-- Optional: If you have technical suggestions on how this could be implemented (e.g. specific Firebase queries, Gemini prompt changes, new API routes), share them here. -->

## Priority

<!-- How important is this to you? -->

- [ ] 🔴 Critical — blocking NGO operations
- [ ] 🟠 High — significant improvement to workflow
- [ ] 🟡 Medium — would be nice to have
- [ ] 🟢 Low — minor quality-of-life improvement

## Additional Context

<!-- Screenshots, mockups, links to similar implementations, or any other context. -->
